title: Model Adaptation Path
description: Build fluency in Model Adaptation inside Transfer Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Cross-Domain Transfer Learning
steps.summary: Cross-Domain Transfer Learning belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after Transfer Learning and Q-Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: Establish the core vocabulary for Model Adaptation. Start here to anchor your understanding of this area.

steps.title: Cross-Task Transfer Learning
steps.summary: Cross-Task Transfer Learning belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after Transfer Learning and Q-Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: Establish the core vocabulary for Model Adaptation. Start here to anchor your understanding of this area.

steps.title: Fine Tuning
steps.summary: Fine Tuning belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after P-Tuning. It opens into Instruction Fine Tuning and fine-tuning T5.
steps.whyIncluded: Builds on earlier terms to connect patterns and variants in Model Adaptation. The concept graph makes it a useful bridge to specialized methods.

steps.title: Frozen Layers in Transfer Learning
steps.summary: Frozen Layers in Transfer Learning belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after Frozen Layers and Transfer Learning. It opens into Frozen Layers in Transfer Learning Extensions and Frozen Layers in Transfer Learning Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Builds on earlier terms to connect patterns and variants in Model Adaptation. The concept graph makes it a useful bridge to specialized methods.

steps.title: Instruction Fine Tuning

steps.title: Pretrained Weights from Transfer Learning
steps.summary: Pretrained Weights from Transfer Learning belongs to the Transfer Learning area of AI/ML, within Model Adaptation. It sits inside Transfer Learning / Model Adaptation. Start after Transfer Learning and Q-Learning.
